hooks.statusMessage: Checking staged markdown before git commit
hooks.command:
/usr/bin/env ruby -rjson -rtmpdir -rshellwords -e 'payload = JSON.parse(STDIN.read) rescue {}; command = payload.dig("tool_input", "command").to_s; exit 0 unless command.start_with?("git commit"); files = `git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMRT`.lines.map(&:chomp).grep(/\.md$/); exit 0 if files.empty?; repo_root = `git rev-parse --show-toplevel`.strip; Dir.mktmpdir("codex-mdl-style-") do |style_dir|; style_path = File.join(style_dir, ".mdl_style.rb"); rules = `mdl --list-rules`.lines.map { |line| line[/^MD\d+/] }.compact; rules -= %w[MD004 MD007]; File.write(style_path, "all
" + rules.map { |rule| "exclude_rule '''#{rule}'''" }.join("
") + "
rule '''MD004''', :style => '''asterisk'''
rule '''MD007''', :indent => 4
"); failed = files.any? do |file|; abs = File.join(repo_root, file); !system("mdl", abs, chdir: style_dir); end; if failed; puts JSON.generate({"hookSpecificOutput" => {"hookEventName" => "PreToolUse", "permissionDecision" => "deny", "permissionDecisionReason" => "markdown lint failed for staged markdown files"}}); end; end'
